faqs.question: What types of spiders are common in Kearny, NJ?
faqs.answer: Kearny residents most commonly encounter house spiders, cellar spiders, wolf spiders, and occasionally black widows in darker areas like basements and garages. Our technicians are trained to identify and eliminate all spider species found in New Jersey, using targeted treatments based on the specific type of spider in your property.
